rows.notes: Snowdon Timber Reject Treated 2x1" Batten 2.4m x 50mm x 22mm, 10-pack, £46.99. Natural/brown pressure-treated finish (not the blue BS5534 roofing batten). Exact 50x22 section — stays within the forbidden batten_h constraint that drives shelf_thickness. Cosmetic rejects (knots, wane, surface defects) are fine here since cladding hides the battens. 1 pack covers the job: 3 of the 10 sticks cut the 11x426mm pieces (each 2.4m yields 5x426mm), leaving 7 spare sticks.

Klikstrom Pressure treated Green Timber Feather edge Fence board 2.4m x 125mm x 11mm, Pack of 8. B&Q only stocks 11mm thick (design calls for 15mm); thinner boards mean slightly reduced overlap stiffness but acceptable for a bin store. 2 packs = 16 boards, covers ~35m total.
AFIT Galvanised Gate Tee Hinges 400mm (16 inch) heavy duty, 2-pack. One pack gives 2 hinges for the door.

Cuprinol Garden Shades Country Cream Matt Exterior Wood paint, 2.5L. Off-white cream shade. NO separate primer/undercoat needed — Garden Shades is formulated to soak directly into bare softwood and pressure-treated timber; 2 coats recommended. 2.5L covers ~12 m² per coat; total external surface area of the bin store is ~6 m², so one tin easily covers 2 coats. Let pressure-treated timber dry ~2-4 weeks before painting.
SkyGuard EPDM Rubber Roof Kit 1.4m x 2.4m, £77.66. Generous overhang for a 1300x750 bin-store roof; kit includes adhesive.

B&Q Plywood WBP Exterior 18mm 2440mm x 1220mm (8ft x 4ft), ~£37. Standard exterior/WBP grade — marine BS1088 is over-spec for a covered bin store under EPDM. Sole 18mm cut is the 1350x800 roof deck; one sheet covers it with plenty of waste for mistakes.

Arranwood Hardwood Plywood 6mm 2440mm x 1220mm (8ft x 4ft), PACK OF 2. Exterior/WBP grade (EN 636-2) — marine BS1088 is over-spec for a painted, roof-sheltered back panel. Two 1300x824mm pieces do NOT nest on a single 2440x1220 sheet (1300+1300 > 2440 and 824+824 > 1220), so 2 sheets are needed — the pack of 2 covers the job. Check stock at purchase time.
Metsa Wood Smooth Planed PSE Whitewood spruce Stick timber 2.4m x 70mm x 34mm. Exact section match. Each stick fits one 1540mm + one 682mm cut (~2225mm + kerf, well inside 2400mm).
